overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest at night holding a torch. The player encounters a mysterious seated figure in white clothing and later a small rabbit before continuing deeper into the woods. The scene is illuminated by warm torchlight against the dark surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt forest path, torch illuminating the way ahead through the trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and patches of grass
tall pine tree trunks rising into the darkness
tall pine tree trunks lining the right side
dense green ferns and shrubs along the path edge
dense green vegetation and small plants
earthen wall with exposed roots and grass on the right side of path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dark forest at night. The path is a dirt trail surrounded by dense pine trees and underbrush, illuminated by the warm glow of a handheld torch. An earthen embankment with exposed roots appears briefly on the right side around the 12-second mark.

events.description: seated figure in white dress becomes visible sitting motionless on a log by the left side of the path
player passes the seated figure and continues forward along the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a mysterious seated figure in white clothing sitting by the path

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress sitting motionless on a fallen log, illuminated by torchlight

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking and encounters a mysterious seated figure in white clothing sitting on a log by the left side of the path. The figure remains motionless as the player approaches and passes by. The dirt embankment from the previous section disappears behind as the path continues through the dense forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper forest trail with scattered debris

events.description: small rabbit appears on the right side of the path
rabbit hops away into the underbrush and disappears

agents.ego_description: continuing the journey deeper into the forest, briefly observing a rabbit before it flees

notable_agents.action: small brown rabbit sitting on the path edge before hopping away into the darkness

entered.detail: scattered dead branches and logs on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the deeper forest, the torch revealing more dense vegetation and scattered fallen branches on the ground. A small rabbit briefly appears on the right side of the path around 27 seconds, sitting momentarily before hopping away into the underbrush. The trail remains narrow and enclosed by tall trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, oppressive forest that gradually reveals mysterious inhabitants as the path deepens. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt trail flanked by dense pine trees and underbrush, passing an earthen embankment with exposed roots illuminated by the warm glow of a handheld torch. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts to encounter a motionless figure in white clothing seated on a log by the left side of the path. The journey then continues deeper into the woods, where the torchlight reveals scattered fallen branches and thicker vegetation. Finally, the camera catches sight of a small rabbit sitting on the right side of the trail before it hops away into the underbrush, leaving the viewer enclosed by the towering trees.
